title: hieracium lachenalii subsp. praeciliatiforme
intro: Hieracium lachenalii subsp. praeciliatiforme is a lesser-known subspecies of the Hieracium lachenalii plant, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and commonly known as hawkweed. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Hieracium lachenalii subsp. praeciliatiforme include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a useful remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its numerous health benefits.
